hut.example: They lived in a small wooden hut.
hut.example_zh: 他們住在一間小木屋裡。

icy.example: Be careful on the icy road.

immediate.example: The sick man needs immediate help.
immediate.example_zh: 那個病人需要立即的幫助。

impress.example_zh: 她的演講讓大家印象深刻。

indoor.example: We played an indoor game when it rained.
indoor.example_zh: 下雨時我們玩室內遊戲。

indoors.example: Let's stay indoors during the storm.
indoors.example_zh: 暴風雨時我們待在室內吧。

industrial.example: This is an industrial area with many factories.
industrial.example_zh: 這是個有許多工廠的工業區。

inferior.example: The cheap shoes are of inferior quality.
inferior.example_zh: 這雙便宜的鞋品質較差。

inform.example: Please inform me of any changes.

information.example_zh: 我在網路上找到有用的資訊。

injury.example: He missed the game because of an injury.

inn.example: We stayed at a small inn for the night.
inn.example_zh: 我們在一家小旅館過夜。

inner.example: She felt a sense of inner peace.
inner.example_zh: 她感到一種內心的平靜。

intelligent.example_zh: 海豚是非常聰明的動物。

interrupt.example: Please don't interrupt while I'm speaking.

inventor.example: The inventor created a useful tool.
inventor.example_zh: 這位發明家創造了一個有用的工具。

invitation.example: I received an invitation to the party.
invitation.example_zh: 我收到了派對的邀請函。

ivory.example: It is illegal to sell ivory.

jail.example: The thief was put in jail.

jar.example: She filled the jar with cookies.

jaw.example: He hurt his jaw in the accident.

jazz.example: He enjoys listening to jazz music.

jealous.example: She was jealous of her sister's new toy.

jeep.example: They drove a jeep across the desert.
jeep.example_zh: 他們開著吉普車穿越沙漠。

jet.example: The jet flew high above the clouds.
A jet of water shot from the pipe.

jewel.example: The crown was covered with jewels.

jewelry.example: She keeps her jewelry in a small box.
jewelry.example_zh: 她把首飾放在一個小盒子裡。

journey.example: Their journey across the country took a week.
journey.example_zh: 他們橫越全國的旅程花了一週。

joyful.example: It was a joyful family reunion.
joyful.example_zh: 那是一場歡樂的家庭團聚。

juicy.example: The orange was sweet and juicy.

jungle.example: Tigers live in the thick jungle.
jungle.example_zh: 老虎住在茂密的叢林裡。

junior.example: He is a junior member of the club.
junior.example_zh: 他是這個社團的資淺成員。

junior.example: She plays in the junior team.

junk.example: The garage is full of old junk.

kangaroo.example: A kangaroo carries its baby in a pouch.
kangaroo.example_zh: 袋鼠用育兒袋帶著寶寶。

keyboard.example: He types fast on the keyboard.

kidney.example: The kidney removes waste from the body.

kilometer.example: The race is ten kilometers long.

kindergarten.example: My little brother goes to kindergarten.

kingdom.example: The king ruled a peaceful kingdom.
kingdom.example_zh: 國王統治著一個和平的王國。

kit.example: Keep a first-aid kit in the car.

knight.example: The brave knight fought the dragon.

knit.example_zh: 奶奶織了一條溫暖的圍巾。

knot.example: He tied a knot in the rope.
She knotted the two ends together.

koala.example: The koala slept in the tree.

label.example: Read the label before you buy it.

label.example_zh: 她在每個箱子上清楚標示。

lace.example: Her dress was decorated with white lace.
lace.example_zh: 她的洋裝飾有白色蕾絲。

lace.example: Tie your shoe laces before running.

ladder.example: He climbed the ladder to fix the roof.

laughter.example: The room was full of laughter.

laundry.example: I need to do the laundry today.

lawn.example: He mows the lawn every weekend.

leak.example: The roof leaks when it rains.
There is a leak in the water pipe.
